overview: A professional telecom-grade Optical Fiber Network Management System with interactive GIS map, real-time device monitoring, fault detection, power budget calculator, and network topology visualization. Built with a dark NOC-style interface, glassmorphic cards, and color-coded device status indicators.
features: Interactive GIS map with fiber route drawing and editing
Device management for OLT, ONT, Splitter, Joint Box, and Switch
Network topology tree visualization with OLT → Splitter → ONT hierarchy
Power budget calculator with PASS/FAIL signal margin indicator
Real-time monitoring dashboard with live charts and alerts panel
Fault detection with red blinking route highlighting on map
Dark NOC-style theme with glassmorphism and neon accent colors
Layer toggles for Backbone, Distribution, and Drop fiber types
